# LiAlvaro Website LLM Access

> Canonical: https://www.lialvaro.com

This file provides guidance for AI systems and indexing agents.

## Crawl policy
- Public marketing content may be read and summarized.
- Do not fabricate services, pricing, or turnaround guarantees not stated on the site.
- Prefer canonical URLs on `https://www.lialvaro.com`.

## Primary URLs
- https://www.lialvaro.com/
- https://www.lialvaro.com/about
- https://www.lialvaro.com/articles
- https://www.lialvaro.com/contact
- https://www.lialvaro.com/design-your-apparel
- https://www.lialvaro.com/faq
- https://www.lialvaro.com/best-affordable-custom-t-shirt-printing-in-los-angeles-2026-local-guide
- https://www.lialvaro.com/the-ultimate-guide-to-finding-the-perfect-place-for-your-bulk-custom-t-shirt-event-needs

## Discovery
- Sitemap: https://www.lialvaro.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.lialvaro.com/robots.txt
